title: Move feature installation from running container to image build phase via generated Dockerfile with deterministic layers, pass feature options as ENV vars, skip feature build step when no features configured, ensure Docker cache works on unchanged configs

Complete updateRemoteUserUID implementation: host UID/GID detection, usermod/groupmod execution in container, skip conditions (non-Linux, root, already matching, explicitly false), graceful fallback on failure, with unit and integration tests
Parse and forward --profile flags to docker compose up/down/exec commands, support multiple profiles, wire from CLI args through ComposeProject to ComposeCommand
